description: Comprehensive phase identification of the water-quenched ultralightweight steel combining XRD (a) and TEM (b) analysis. XRD pattern confirms the coexistence of austenite (γ), κ-carbide, and ordered DO₃ phase, while TEM micrographs reveal the nanoscale distribution of fine κ-carbide precipitates within the austenite matrix and the morphological characteristics of DO₃ phase at grain boundaries, demonstrating the uniform microstructure achieved through optimized heat treatment.
